name: Kolkata-class Destroyer
description: India's most advanced indigenously designed guided missile destroyer featuring the MF-STAR active phased array radar and BrahMos supersonic anti-ship missiles.

specialAbilities.name: BrahMos Supersonic Missiles
specialAbilities.description: 16 BrahMos missiles travel at Mach 2.8, giving enemy ships minimal reaction time against incoming salvos.

specialAbilities.name: MF-STAR AESA Radar
specialAbilities.description: Israeli-derived active phased array radar provides 360-degree surveillance and fire control capability.
